name: @metacrdt/convex
description: MetaCRDT Convex target helpers: protocol metadata validators, Convex-row adapters, component-owned protocol log/current projection/cardinality functions, and optional Confect integration utilities.

scripts.build: tsdown src/index.ts src/component/convex.config.ts src/component/schema.ts src/component/protocol.ts src/component/log.ts src/component/_generated/component.ts --root src --format esm --dts --clean --platform neutral --target es2020 --unbundle
